## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content marketing efforts for Abnormal Security and discuss LLM optimization strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has published 100+ articles for Abnormal in 3 months, ramping up to 20-25 pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [LLM mentions are becoming as important as SEO for driving awareness; GrowthX is developing optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [GrowthX uses a highly automated content creation workflow with human oversight at key steps](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)
  - [Abnormal seeks to better understand top-of-funnel metrics and their relationship to future revenue](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)

## Topics

### Content Marketing Progress

  - [Published 100+ articles in 3 months, now producing 20-25 pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Content split between blog posts and glossary entries](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Traffic growing steadily, though full SEO impact takes 6-9 months](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Ranking for some difficult keywords, indicating website authority](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### LLM Optimization Strategies

  - [Monitoring 88 prompts for Abnormal mentions in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Optimizing content for "chunk-level retrieval" to improve LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Challenges: LLM behavior constantly changing, lack of transparency from providers](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Strategy: Create content that has potential to be picked up, iterate based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Highly automated process with human oversight at key steps](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [Steps include: assignment brief, research, outline creation, writing, fact-checking, internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [Custom-built tools used instead of off-the-shelf solutions](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating easily updatable content to adapt to changing LLM behaviors](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)

### Measuring Impact and ROI

  - [Abnormal currently focuses on opportunity creation rather than top-of-funnel metrics](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)
  - [Need to develop better understanding of relationship between content performance and future revenue](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)
  - [Goal: Use content marketing metrics to inform sales team expansion and territory planning](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to develop machine for optimizing content for both SEO and LLMs in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
  - [Share list of monitored prompts with Abnormal team for input on additional prompts to track](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Explore ways to tie top-of-funnel metrics to future revenue projections](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)
  - [Consider regional content strategies to support sales team expansion in specific markets](https://fathom.video/share/QXJ7G9y7RzYRvZuDErVxNATc-qcztvqQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2809.0)
